chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S- 169 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of main case 18-12-2023 Mr. Abdul Rasheed Kalwar, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant A.G. ***** Petitioners are complainant party in Sessions Case No.249 of 2023, arising out of crime No.34 of 2023, registered at P.S, Daharki under sections 302 PPC etc. Their grievance is that the police is not making any effort to arrest the absconders. It is informed that the case has been challaned and is pending before learned Additional Sessions Judge, Ubauro. The trial Court is directed to put up all efforts for procuring the attendance of accused and if necessary adopt coercive methods, provided under the law. The police is directed to follow instructions of the trial Court for the purpose of arresting these absconders. The petition therefore having served its purpose is disposed of with the consent of both parties. JUDGE Ahmad
